title: paspalum altsonii
intro: Paspalum altsonii, also known as Paspalum paspaloides, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Paspalum altsonii include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Paspalum altsonii include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be made by boiling the leaves and stems in water or mixing them with a solvent like ethanol to extract its active compounds.
